arts.ttl: Analysis: Can Ait-Nouri step up for Wolves in Cunha's absence?
arts.sum: That impressive run has taken them out of the relegation zone, but with talisman Matheus Cunha suspended for Monday night’s match at home to Nottingham Forest, the new head coach at Molineux must find a way to win without his best player. If Pereira wants to push Ait-Nouri on and deploy him in the Cunha role, his starting XI could look something like this, with Rodrigo Gomes coming in at left wing-back.
